response.justification: The candidate has roughly 19 years of hands-on software development across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus entrepreneurial experience founding an open-source geo-data platform. However, the role is a director-level individual contributor focused on AI strategy, and the resume shows sustained senior-developer-level scope rather than principal-level technical leadership, organizational influence, or strategic advisory work. AI exposure is recent and tooling-oriented (MCP code generators, agent infrastructure since 2025) rather than recognized expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms, which is the core of this role.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency distributed systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of an open-source geo-data platform used in production by real organizations
Strong engineering craft: TDD, open-source library authorship, workshops, and public talks demonstrating knowledge sharing
concerns: No demonstrated principal/director-level scope — career trajectory is senior IC delivery work, not strategic or organizational leadership
AI experience is shallow and recent (agent tooling since 2025); no recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms
Limited evidence of advising executives, partners, or customers on technology strategy, a core responsibility of the role

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth vs. role requirements
Years of experience and entrepreneurial background
